name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram at 1201 E Plaza Blvd, National City, CA 91950 is open 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM daily. Call +1 800-746-7287.
description_long:
MoneyGram is a global money transfer and financial services company that operates through a network of agent locations rather than standalone storefronts. The company has established partnerships with retail businesses—such as Video Club in this National City location—to provide access to cash-based financial services in communities across the United States. This agent-based model allows MoneyGram to reach customers through convenient neighborhood retailers and specialty stores.

At participating MoneyGram locations, customers can send and receive money transfers domestically and internationally, cash checks, purchase money orders, pay bills, and conduct other cash-related transactions. The National City location at 333 Highland Ave operates extended hours from 7 AM to midnight daily, providing accessibility for customers with varied schedules. All cash services require a valid legal form of identification, which is standard practice in the financial services industry for compliance and fraud prevention.

MoneyGram's distinguishing characteristic is its extensive agent network model, which differs from traditional banks or standalone money transfer stores. By partnering with existing retail locations, MoneyGram achieves widespread geographic distribution and integrates financial services into places where consumers already shop. The company emphasizes online and offline management of transfers, allowing customers to initiate transactions through multiple channels.

The service is straightforward for customers needing basic money transfer and check cashing services. However, availability depends entirely on agent location partnerships, and service quality or hours may vary by partner. MoneyGram is best suited for customers seeking convenient money transfer and cash services in their neighborhood rather than those requiring comprehensive banking relationships or credit products.
address: 1201 E Plaza Blvd, National City, CA 91950

company_info.headquarters: 1201 E Plaza Blvd, National City, CA 91950

pros: Extended daily hours (7 AM-11:59 PM, seven days a week) at this location for accessibility
Can send and receive money both domestically and internationally through the MoneyGram network
Ability to manage transfers online or in-person, offering flexibility in transaction methods
Located within an existing retail store (Video Club), providing convenient neighborhood access
Simple identity verification process with standard legal ID requirement
Multiple services available at single location: money transfer, check cashing, money orders, bill payment
No account opening required for basic cash transaction services
cons: Service availability entirely dependent on agent location partnerships—not all neighborhoods have access
No information provided about fees, exchange rates, or transfer costs on the website
Limited control over service quality since MoneyGram relies on third-party retail partners
Cash-only services with no indication of credit-building, savings, or investment products
Hours and service offerings may vary by location despite corporate standards
best_for: Customers needing to send or receive money transfers without opening a bank account
Individuals who require check cashing services at convenient neighborhood retail locations
People seeking money transfer services during extended evening and weekend hours
Customers making international remittances who want a familiar, established provider
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need reliable money transfer and check cashing services without traditional banking relationships. The primary caveat is that MoneyGram is a transaction-based service provider, not a financial institution—it offers no credit building, savings products, or long-term financial solutions, and pricing information is unavailable on the website.
